name: @hypelink/theme-classical
description: HypeLink 古典風格主題 — 襯線字型、羊皮紙質感與金飾邊框

scripts.build: node scripts/write-theme-publish.mjs && next build && node scripts/copy-publish-to-out.mjs && node scripts/fix-asset-paths.mjs
scripts.build:esm: HYPELINK_THEME_VERSION=v2 node scripts/write-theme-publish.mjs && vite build && node scripts/copy-publish-to-esm.mjs
